purpose: post-swap baseline, first eval on Gemma 4 E4B with native tool_calls on Lemonade v10.2.0

rerun_notes.initial_run: Lemonade initially loaded Gemma with default ctx_size=4096, causing 3 ctx-overflow failures (budget_query, smart_discovery, cross_turn_file_recall).
rerun_notes.reloaded: Reloaded Gemma with ctx_size=32768; re-ran the 3 affected scenarios and all passed.
rerun_notes.known_path_read_rerun: Also re-ran known_path_read after reload; still FAIL at 5.6. Confirms real model regression, not ctx-masked. Kept original 6.67 score in the scorecard.
